overall.description: Static third-person view of a gothic dining hall interior from a video game, featuring students in dark robes seated at long wooden tables beneath vaulted stone ceilings with iron chandeliers. The scene remains stationary with minimal action, showcasing the atmospheric architecture and ambient lighting of the hall.

entered.detail: high arched stone ceiling with ribbed vaulting and dark wooden beams
ornate iron chandelier hanging from ceiling with multiple candle-style lights

simple wooden bench seat in immediate foreground

rectangular framed painting hanging on the stone wall
elaborately carved wooden cabinet with decorative details
large silver serving vessel with lid sitting atop the sideboard

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a static third-person view of a gothic-style dining hall interior. The player character stands in the foreground observing the space, while NPC students sit at long wooden tables. The hall features high vaulted stone ceilings, hanging iron chandeliers, and ornate wooden furniture, creating a moody, atmospheric environment typical of a magical school setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static third-person perspective within a moody, gothic dining hall that emphasizes the atmospheric scale of a magical school. It begins with a fixed view of the player character standing in the foreground, observing the vast interior. The camera holds its position as the eye travels across the space, taking in the NPC students seated at long wooden tables. The scene then expands upward to reveal high vaulted stone ceilings and hanging iron chandeliers that cast a dim light over the ornate wooden furniture. Finally, the view settles into the stillness of the environment, highlighting the architectural grandeur and somber mood of the hall.
